message: Fix asupersync capability matrix gate for franken_networkx-sdr5

 {"id":"franken_networkx-sa1e","title":"to_undirected chooses reverse-edge attrs instead of NetworkX insertion-order attrs","description":"testing-conformance-harnesses: differential testing shows to_undirected(DiGraph) keeps the reverse-edge attribute payload for reciprocal edges, while NetworkX preserves the first inserted directed edge's data. Add parity coverage and match upstream behavior.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-18T21:15:57.848619852Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T21:19:19.551166755Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T21:19:19.549350004Z","close_reason":"Matched NetworkX to_undirected reciprocal-edge attribute precedence and added parity coverage","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"franken_networkx-sas7","title":"Remove planar_layout direct NetworkX layout fallback","description":"Replace the planar_layout wrapper with a direct parity implementation that validates dimensions, obtains a planar embedding, uses combinatorial_embedding_to_pos, rescales/stores positions, and adds a no-delegation test that patches networkx.planar_layout. This is a bounded step short of a full native PlanarEmbedding port.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T11:19:42.274485609Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T11:23:26.499359749Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T11:23:26.497215411Z","close_reason":"Completed direct planar_layout fallback removal and no-delegation parity tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

-{"id":"franken_networkx-sdr5","title":"[HIGH] review: workspace all-target test gate fails on asupersync pin drift","description":"Review finding from review-only cod pass on 2026-04-22.

Evidence:
- `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_franken_networkx_cod cargo test --workspace --all-targets` fails on current `main`.
- Failing test: `crates/fnx-conformance/tests/asupersync_capability_matrix_gate.rs:95` in `asupersync_capability_matrix_contract_is_complete_and_fail_closed`.
- Gate expects `fnx-runtime Cargo.toml` to contain `asupersync = { version = "0.2.0"`, but current file has `asupersync = { version = "0.3.1", optional = true, default-features = false }` at `crates/fnx-runtime/Cargo.toml:15`.

Impact:
- Full workspace verification is red on `main`, so release-confidence is degraded even though narrower crate tests pass.

Suggested fix:
- Either update the capability-matrix conformance artifact/test to the intended pinned version, or restore the `fnx-runtime` dependency pin expected by the contract.
- Re-run `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` through `rch` after the contract is reconciled.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-04-22T08:07:46.894863332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T08:07:46.894863332Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","review"]}
+{"id":"franken_networkx-sdr5","title":"[HIGH] review: workspace all-target test gate fails on asupersync pin drift","description":"Review finding from review-only cod pass on 2026-04-22.

Evidence:
- `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_franken_networkx_cod cargo test --workspace --all-targets` fails on current `main`.
- Failing test: `crates/fnx-conformance/tests/asupersync_capability_matrix_gate.rs:95` in `asupersync_capability_matrix_contract_is_complete_and_fail_closed`.
- Gate expects `fnx-runtime Cargo.toml` to contain `asupersync = { version = "0.2.0"`, but current file has `asupersync = { version = "0.3.1", optional = true, default-features = false }` at `crates/fnx-runtime/Cargo.toml:15`.

Impact:
- Full workspace verification is red on `main`, so release-confidence is degraded even though narrower crate tests pass.

Suggested fix:
- Either update the capability-matrix conformance artifact/test to the intended pinned version, or restore the `fnx-runtime` dependency pin expected by the contract.
- Re-run `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` through `rch` after the contract is reconciled.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"ubuntu","created_at":"2026-04-22T08:07:46.894863332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-22T10:01:47.779270852Z","closed_at":"2026-04-22T10:01:47.777436493Z","close_reason":"Fixed asupersync capability matrix pin drift","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","review"]}

 {"id":"franken_networkx-snc8","title":"parity: dijkstra path wrappers should preserve missing-node and target contracts","description":"dijkstra_path and dijkstra_path_length currently raise NodeNotFound when the target node is absent, while NetworkX treats that case as an unreachable-target contract and raises NetworkXNoPath ('No path to z.' / 'Node z not reachable from a'). The source-missing error text also differs. Match NetworkX's exception types and messages across the direct Dijkstra path wrappers.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T06:21:00.544134252Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T16:08:16.392135589Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T16:08:16.390307649Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # asupersync Capability Matrix + Integration Boundary Contract (V1)
 
 - generated_at_utc: `2026-02-15T19:23:00+00:00`
-- baseline_comparator: `legacy_networkx/main@python3.12 + asupersync@0.2.0`
+- baseline_comparator: `legacy_networkx/main@python3.12 + asupersync@0.3.1`
 - owning_crate: `fnx-runtime`
 - feature_gate: `asupersync-integration`
